name: bottle
intro: An apothecary bottle is a glass container used by apothecaries to store and dispense medicinal liquids and powders. These bottles are typically made of thick, high-quality glass to prevent breakage and maintain the purity of the contents. Apothecaries use them to store and label various remedies, allowing for easy identification and dispensing to patients. The bottles often feature decorative labels and caps, adding a touch of elegance to the apothecary's workspace. By using apothecary bottles, apothecaries can maintain a clean and organized workspace while ensuring the safe handling of medicinal substances.
